notes:
Phase 7: JS E2E Suite + Testing-Feature Retrofits. Two tracks executed.

Track A (production code retrofits):

mxdx-61h (commit 3d67c76): Megolm retrofit — enable matrix-sdk testing feature, switch encrypt_for_room to use OlmMachine::encrypt_room_event_raw via Client::olm_machine_for_testing(). Megolm<Bytes> now wraps real m.room.encrypted ciphertext. send_megolm sends already-encrypted content without re-encrypting. Second addendum added to ADR 2026-04-15-megolm-bytes-newtype.md restoring byte-identical ciphertext.

mxdx-awe.52 (commit a3f39ab): Device-sign retrofit — replace MatrixHandshakeSigner's ephemeral-key flow with direct OlmMachine::sign() via testing feature. Replace MatrixPeerKeySource's ephemeral-key lookup with verified device Ed25519 key cache. Add sign_with_device_key() and get_peer_device_ed25519() to MatrixClient. ADR 2026-04-16-ephemeral-key-cross-cert.md marked Superseded. VerifyError::SigningFailed variant added.

mxdx-awe.53 (commit 78a72ab): Handshake integration — wire p2p-verify.js Ed25519 transcript signing into p2p-transport.js live handshake flow. Protocol-version negotiation: v=2 = Ed25519 handshake, absent/v=1 = legacy nonce ping-pong. Backwards compatible.

Track B (beta E2E test suite):

mxdx-awe.31 (commit 6512cbb, T-70): Shared beta test helpers at packages/e2e-tests/src/beta.js — loadBetaCredentials, skipIfNoBetaCredentials, assertTimingTolerant, spawnRustBinary, measure.

mxdx-awe.32 (commit 87da5b2, T-71): rust-p2p-beta-single-hs.test.js — 3 tests: basic P2P, fallback, glare resolution against ca1-beta.

mxdx-awe.33 (commit 87da5b2, T-72): rust-p2p-beta-federated.test.js — cross-HS P2P + Megolm decryption verification across ca1↔ca2.

mxdx-awe.34 (commit 87da5b2, T-73): rust-npm-interop-beta.test.js — 8-combination interop matrix. Rust-Rust combinations fully wired; npm subprocess combinations placeholdered (follow-up mxdx-5qp).

mxdx-awe.35 (commit 87da5b2, T-74): rust-p2p-beta-perf.test.js — perf gate with exec round-trip timing against absolute SLOs.

mxdx-awe.36 (commit 87da5b2, T-75): rust-p2p-beta-security.test.js — verification rejection, plaintext-on-wire check, security-grep gate.

mxdx-awe.51 (closed): Federated perf baseline infrastructure in place via the perf test file.

SECURITY INVARIANTS VERIFIED:
- Megolm<Bytes> trybuild tests pass (no public constructor)
- SealedKey trybuild tests pass
- scripts/check-no-unencrypted-sends.sh green
- MatrixHandshakeSigner now signs with device long-term Ed25519 — stronger binding than ephemeral keys
- MatrixPeerKeySource uses verified device cache with cross-signing gate
- No new send_raw / skip_encryption patterns in any Phase 7 diff
- testing feature deps (wiremock, matrix-sdk-test, assert_matches2) in production build — accepted per ADR

FOLLOW-UPS FILED:
- mxdx-muk (P3): Update .gitignore for test artifacts and beads state
- mxdx-5qp (P2): Wire npm client/launcher subprocess spawning in rust-npm-interop-beta.test.js (Phase 8)
